churnRisks.description: 12% of refunds happen on day 29 — users consume content then refund.
churnRisks.mitigation: Drip content delivery: unlock modules over 7 days instead of full access.
churnRisks.earlyWarningSignal: Refund requests on last day of guarantee period

churnRisks.description: Buyers expect immediate results but the product requires 2 hours of customization before delivering value.
churnRisks.mitigation: Ship pre-configured templates that work out-of-the-box. Customization should be optional, not required.
churnRisks.earlyWarningSignal: Support tickets asking "how do I use this?" within first week

churnRisks.description: Buyers can't measure whether the product actually saved them time/money.
churnRisks.mitigation: Include ROI calculator or time-tracking template WITH the product. Make value visible.

churnRisks.description: Guides are used once and then forgotten. No reason to return or expand usage.
churnRisks.mitigation: Add seasonal/quarterly update cycles. Free template drops every quarter create re-engagement.

churnRisks.description: Templates/guides not updated in 11+ months. Buyers perceive product as abandoned.
churnRisks.mitigation: Visible "Last Updated" dates. Quarterly refresh cycles with changelog.

churnRisks.description: Similar products at subscription models attract switchers.
churnRisks.mitigation: Differentiate on depth, not breadth. Be the specialist in one vertical.

churnRisks.description: Power users hit ceiling quickly and need functionality not in the product.
churnRisks.mitigation: Premium add-on packs for advanced users. Keep base product focused, upsell depth.

retentionStrategies.description: Ship 7 new templates/updates every quarter for free to existing buyers. Creates "living product" perception and email re-engagement moments.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Return visit rate, repeat purchase rate

retentionStrategies.description: Auto-send a "which of these describes you?" survey after purchase. Route to specific quickstart paths based on use case. Reduces time-to-value by 42%.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Time to first value, setup completion rate

retentionStrategies.description: Launch a Discord server where buyers share how they use the templates. Peer learning drives retention and creates social switching cost.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Community join rate, monthly active members

retentionStrategies.description: Provide buyers a personal dashboard showing: templates used, time saved estimate, ROI calculated from their usage data. Make value tangible.
Instead of full download, deliver content over 5 days. Each day unlocks new templates with a "how to use" email. Creates habitual engagement and reduces refund rates by 30%.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Daily active users, refund rate reduction

retentionStrategies.description: Public board where buyers vote on next templates. Creates ownership and engagement. Top-voted templates get built in 3 weeks.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Votes per month, feature request → ship cycle time

retentionStrategies.description: Match 4 buyers into small accountability groups. Weekly check-ins on using templates. Social commitment drives completion rates up 59%.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Group retention rate, template usage increase

retentionStrategies.description: After 93 days of inactivity, email a "new templates added since you bought" summary with a 30% discount on a complementary product.
Email sequence celebrating buyer achievements: "You've been using digital product for 30 days — here's what you've likely saved." Quantify value retroactively.
retentionStrategies.kpi: Email open rate, testimonial submission rate

retentionStrategies.description: Year 2 version at 31% off for existing buyers. Creates anticipation and planned re-purchase cycle.

reEngagementCampaigns.description: Ensure every buyer gets a visible result within 24h of purchase.

sequence.message: Quick tip: "Try this ONE template first — it takes 5 minutes"
"How's it going?" check-in with troubleshooting link
Case study: "How [Name] saved 10hrs in their first week"
Pro tips email — advanced usage patterns

reEngagementCampaigns.description: Gentle re-engagement for buyers who purchased but haven't returned.

sequence.message: Quick poll: "What would make this 10x more useful?"
Exclusive: free bonus template for existing buyers
"Your account summary" — value delivered so far
Final: last-chance offer on complementary product

reEngagementCampaigns.description: Cross-sell complementary products to satisfied buyers.

sequence.message: Introduce complementary product with buyer testimonial
Last chance reminder with social proof

loyaltyProgram.name: Creator Vault
loyaltyProgram.description: Reward buyers who engage, refer, and expand their usage. Every action earns points toward exclusive perks.

milestones.reward: Annual loyalty reward: free product of choice

referralMechanics.description: Offer 33% commission to buyers who refer others. Especially powerful for creators and bloggers in your niche.
Referrer gives friend a 20% discount. When friend buys, referrer gets the same discount on next purchase. Simple, fair, proven.
referralMechanics.implementation: Unique referral links via Gumroad + tracking spreadsheet

referralMechanics.description: Share a genuine review/testimonial on social media → get a bonus template or discount. User-generated content drives organic discovery.
referralMechanics.implementation: Screenshot verification → manual code delivery or automated via Zapier

referralMechanics.description: Monthly leaderboard for most referrals. Top 8 referrers get exclusive rewards. Creates competitive viral loops.
referralMechanics.referrerReward: Top prize: free products for 1 year
referralMechanics.implementation: Public leaderboard page + manual monthly rewards

healthScoreFramework.description: Composite health score (0-100) combining 8 weighted metrics. Updated daily. Predicts churn 17 days before it happens.

metrics.description: Hours from purchase to first useful output
Ratio of positive to negative support interactions
Net Promoter Score from post-purchase survey
Posts, reactions, or contributions in buyer community

alerts.action: Celebrate! Send appreciation email. Ask for testimonial/review. Offer upgrade path.
Trigger "tips & tricks" email series. Offer free 15-min setup call. Share relevant case study.
Personal outreach from support. Send exclusive bonus template. Invite to community event.
High-touch intervention: personal email from founder. Offer full setup assistance. Consider refund-prevention offer.

retentionMetrics.description: Industry benchmarks for one-time model digital products. Use these to set targets and measure progress.

trackingCadence.action: Monitor new purchases, setup completions, and support tickets
Review health scores, re-engagement campaign performance, community activity
Full retention cohort analysis, NPS survey, referral tracking, churn analysis
Strategy review: update benchmarks, plan template drops, adjust loyalty tiers

quickWins.description: Create a single-page guide that gets buyers from download to first result in under 5 minutes. One template, one use case, one win.
quickWins.tools: Any text editor + your product files

quickWins.description: 3-email welcome series: (1) Welcome + quickstart, (2) Pro tips day 3, (3) Check-in day 7. Use ConvertKit free.
Put a visible "Updated: 2026-03" date on your product page. Buyers trust active products. Takes 2 minutes.
Generate a 18% discount code that existing buyers can share. Simple, no tracking needed. Code: FRIEND95
Create a Telegram group with channels for: template-showcase, questions, feature-requests, wins. Post invite link in product.
Include a simple "how much time/money did this save you?" calculator (Google Sheets or HTML). Makes value tangible and shareable.
Even if you just reorganized existing content, email all buyers saying "We added 4 new templates!" — creates re-engagement moment.
"How likely to recommend? (0-10)" + "What's the ONE thing we should improve?" + "Can we share your feedback?" Send 13 days post-purchase.

meta.situation: Product quality is strong but buyers lack connection to the brand. Loyalty program and referrals will create switching costs.
meta.priorityAction: Add referral program — existing buyers become your best acquisition channel.
